description: Mocked response from get_brand_instructions tool for Acme Corp brand.

response.promptBody:
Brand: Acme Corp

Brand Voice: Professional yet approachable. Speak with confidence and clarity. Avoid jargon.

Brand Tone: Warm, encouraging, and empowering. Make the reader feel supported and capable.

Key Messages:
- Innovation made simple
- Your success is our priority
- Technology that works for you

Content Rules:
- Use active voice
- Keep sentences under 20 words
- Address the reader directly with "you"
- Avoid superlatives (never say "best", "fastest", "most powerful")
- Do not use exclamation marks excessively (max 1 per paragraph)

Guardrails:
- Never mention competitors by name
- Do not make performance guarantees or promises
- Avoid technical jargon unless explaining it immediately after
